description: Values that would otherwise look safe (cleanupPeriodDays, DISABLE_TELEMETRY) or simply be unset (the three env-only rules with no configured value here) all conservatively produce a stale-ruleset result for every claude-code rule once the synthetic version is beyond the tested range.

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: The inspected user-level config keeps the local session transcript retention window at or under Claude Code's documented 30-day default. Observed: cleanupPeriodDays = 20.
findings.stale_reason: detected version 9.9.9 is outside every tested range (max tested 2.1.204)

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective error-reporting posture cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers and the ambient process environment may supply or override it. Observed: env.DISABLE_ERROR_REPORTING unset in user config.
findings.stale_reason: detected version 9.9.9 is outside every tested range (max tested 2.1.204)

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective /feedback command posture cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers and the ambient process environment may supply or override it. Observed: env.DISABLE_FEEDBACK_COMMAND unset in user config.
findings.stale_reason: detected version 9.9.9 is outside every tested range (max tested 2.1.204)

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective session quality survey posture cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers, other documented disable paths, and the ambient process environment may supply or override it. Observed: env.CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_FEEDBACK_SURVEY unset in user config.
findings.stale_reason: detected version 9.9.9 is outside every tested range (max tested 2.1.204)

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: The inspected user-level settings.json sets env.DISABLE_TELEMETRY = "1", opting out of Claude Code's usage-metrics telemetry. Observed: env.DISABLE_TELEMETRY = "1".
findings.stale_reason: detected version 9.9.9 is outside every tested range (max tested 2.1.204)
